data.description: Umbrella for the remaining recommendation-#2 work (route the library's public reads in-process via the native packages, after Step-1 SSOT landed in 4283f71) and the recommendation-#1 documentation updates (accurately explain the engine's unpacked-to-disk requirement to resolve the zip-import confusion, and reflect the native-reads work). Plan of record: /tmp/native-reads-plan.md (REV 3). Acceptance: library reads run in-process behind a kill-switch with object-level parity proven; next_batch decision made; docs accurately describe packaging constraints + prerequisites. NON-GOAL: this does not make rebar zip-safe (the engine still requires bash); that is recommendation #3.
data.title: Native in-process reads (#2 remaining) + packaging/prereq docs (#1)
